meta.incident: Internal origin server (api.internal.acme.com) degrades: escalating latency -> 502/503 cascade across cart/checkout/orders routes, plus CPU time limit exceeded on checkout; concurrent recurring KV_NAMESPACE_NOT_FOUND distractor on session lookups

ground_truth.desc: escalating latency warnings before origin went down

ground_truth.needle: upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers

ground_truth.desc: edge function exceeded 50ms CPU budget on retries

ground_truth.needle: typeerror: cannot read properties of undefined
ground_truth.desc: null-deref in orders handler when upstream returned empty body
recurring benign KV misconfiguration distractor unrelated to the outage

evidence.text: {"timestamp":1748822408441,"level":"error","message":"upstream fetch failed: origin=https://api.internal.acme.com status=502 body=bad gateway error=upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers","source":"edge","requestId":"req_9S0T1U2V3W4X","region":"iad1","route":"/api/v1/cart"}

{"timestamp":1748822408891,"level":"error","message":"upstream fetch failed: origin=https://api.internal.acme.com status=502 body=bad gateway error=upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers","source":"edge","requestId":"req_0T1U2V3W4X5Y","region":"iad1","route":"/api/v1/checkout"}

{"timestamp":1748822409502,"level":"error","message":"edge function cpu time limit exceeded: route=/api/v1/checkout cpuTime=51ms limit=50ms requestId=req_0T1U2V3W4X5Y","source":"runtime","requestId":"req_0T1U2V3W4X5Y","region":"iad1","route":"/api/v1/checkout"}

{"timestamp":1748822410612,"level":"error","message":"unhandled rejection in edge function: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'price') at Object.handler (/var/task/api/v1/orders.js:88:22)","source":"runtime","requestId":"req_3W4X5Y6Z7A8B","region":"iad1","route":"/api/v1/orders"}
